% check a.php
a.php:11:2: $name is of type: stdClass (DEBUG)
a.php:17:2: $n is of type: stdClass (DEBUG)
# For now, it is just stdClass. TODO: Fix that.

-- a.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	/** @var string[] */
	public $names;
}

$foo = new Foo;
foreach ($foo->names as $name) {
	#debugType $name
}

foreach (['this', 'will', 'not', 'work'] as $s);

foreach ($foo->names as $index => &$n) {
	#debugType $n
}

foreach ($foo->names as [$bar, $baz]);
